final:
module top_module(
  input [n-1:0] bin,
  output [n-1:0] gray
);parameter n = 4; // number of bits in the binary number

assign gray = bin ^ (bin >> 1);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      gray[n-1] <= ~gray[n-1];
      for (int i = 0; i < n-1; i = i + 1) begin
        gray[i] <= ~gray[i+1];
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
